rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Factor in seasonality for safety stock.

description.short: Classify inventory items by financial value (ABC analysis).
description.long: Classify inventory items by financial value (ABC analysis).

short_i18n.en: Classify inventory items by financial value (ABC analysis).
short_i18n.tr: Stok kalemlerini finansal önemine göre A/B/C sınıflarına ayırır.
short_i18n.de: Klassifizieren Sie Lagerartikel nach finanziellem Wert (ABC-Analyse).
short_i18n.fr: Classer les articles d'inventaire par valeur financière (analyse ABC).
short_i18n.es: Clasificar artículos de inventario por valor financiero (análisis ABC).
short_i18n.ar: صنف عناصر المخزون حسب القيمة المالية (تحليل ABC).
